mapper.select:
SELECT ec.*, u.name as userName, d.dept_name as deptName FROM smart_finance.expense_claim ec LEFT JOIN smart_finance.sys_user u ON ec.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN smart_finance.sys_dept d ON ec.dept_id = d.id
ec.status = 'pending'
AND ec.current_approver_id = #{approverId}
ORDER BY ec.submit_time ASC
